title: keraselma peplus
intro: Keraselma peplus, also known as St John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and five-petaled shape. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the nervous system and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Keraselma peplus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, Keraselma peplus is often used as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also infused into oil for topical application.
